data.body: the modern data war: 1) flood the shitosphere (4chan, X) with junk. 2) sneak talking points into manosphere channels (ie Palmer Luckey fawning over teenaged pregnancy). 3) get a "data-backed" talking point to the top. 4) AI search bots source this manufactured "conversation" as "trusted data."

I am toast.
